name: 15 · Stream Python Body
description: streamInput reducer: a single AutomatedStep with streamInput=true is a long-lived Python process that receives chunks via IPC (aithericon.chunks()) from a streaming producer. The producer (streamOutput=true) emits 4 word chunks (the/quick/brown/fox); the reducer (seeded at net entry) uppercases and concatenates them into 'THE QUICK BROWN FOX'. The Python script owns the reduction logic — no container node, no Petri-net gather barrier. Wire producer.stream → reducer.stream and producer.out → reducer.in (the EOF trigger).
